title: Account
description: An account representing a user or actor in the Weltgewebe, either anchored to a location (Garnrolle) or operating as a Rolle ohne Namen (RoN).

mode.description: The fundamental identity mode. 'verortet' implies an exact residence location is known internally. 'ron' implies no personal info and no individual location.

location.description: The internal, exact location (residence). Should only be present and required if mode=verortet.

public_pos.description: The calculated public position based on location and radius_m (for verortete). RoN accounts do not have a public_pos.

radius_m.description: Fuzziness radius in meters for the public display of a verortete Garnrolle.
